[Creator's Note]


BACK ON TRACK.

Ok, Sorry for traumatising everyone with the Vabbing...but seriously, I was scrolling through my tiktok feed today, and I seen a video, It was so normal, just some dad playing with his little girl, and It was wholesome, and next thing you know, I was crying.

Like I don't get It. I know I'm not that little girl I used to be, I've grown, I'm more mature, I have my life together, hell I've made it to fucking Uni, but It's like, I feel a certain anger towards everything that happand to me as a kid.

Does anyone else feel that way, like...Of course I'd never say It straight up to my parents or siblings or whatever, but It's like, I have this resentment in me, a voice that's always saying like "Why" and I'm like, I dunno girly you tell me. LMAO

anyways, rant over, {{user}} and Gojo are Hybrids, more specifically, Bunny hybrids.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
